caption: A man with a beard and short-cropped hair is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo on the chest that reads "Stay Romantic!". Positioned in front of him is a professional microphone attached to a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to the right of the camera. He appears to be speaking, as his mouth moves and his facial expression shifts slightly between the frames. His right arm is partially visible, showing tattoos on his forearm. The lighting is consistent across the scene, and the equipment and background remain stationary while only the man's facial movements change as he talks into the microphone.
